title: Amazing Fantasy #15
description: The debut of Spider-Man! Peter Parker is bitten by a radioactive spider and gains incredible powers. This issue changed comics forever.

title: The Avengers #1
description: Earth's Mightiest Heroes unite for the first time! Iron Man, Thor, Hulk, Ant-Man, and Wasp band together to fight Loki.

title: X-Men #1
description: Professor Xavier gathers his mutant students – Cyclops, Marvel Girl, Beast, Iceman, and Angel – to form the original X-Men team.

title: Iron Man #128
description: Demon in a Bottle – Tony Stark battles his greatest enemy: alcoholism. One of the most important and mature stories in Marvel history.

title: Civil War #1
description: A superhero civil war splits the Marvel universe as Iron Man and Captain America clash over the Superhuman Registration Act.

title: Infinity Gauntlet #1
description: Thanos obtains all six Infinity Gems and becomes omnipotent. With a snap, he wipes out half of all life in the universe.
